shots.vo: the menu bar piano lights up; the About window drops in immediately
shots.prompt: macOS menubar = a live ROYGBIV piano (C4..B5) lighting per note; the Menu Band About window drops in from the bar right away (no blank intro).

shots.vo: hero — the keyboard plays the waltz
shots.prompt: Hero: the menubar piano + the big About-icon keyboard both light to the glockenspiel waltz; note-particles puff up. 'your menu bar is a synthesizer · type · click · send MIDI'.
The About icon card flips between the keyboard icon and the QR; menubar keeps playing. 'prompt.ac/menuband'.
The language chiclet grid cycles through localizations (EN ES FR DE 日本 中文 …), one highlighted at a time.

shots.vo: end card — scan to get it
shots.prompt: End card: Menu Band wordmark + icon + 'free · macOS 11+ · universal' + the REAL scannable QR to prompt.ac/menuband.
